basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is recruiting 1 ANRF Junior Research Fellow with M.Tech. qualification and GATE/NET score. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

qualification.details: Note: Candidates awaiting M.Tech. results are also eligible to apply.
qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. in Geotechnical Engineering / Earthquake Engineering / Soil Dynamics / Earth Sciences or equivalent + GATE/NET qualified + B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / Earth Sciences

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirement followed by Interview (Online or Physical mode). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Mere eligibility does not guarantee interview call.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must follow these steps:
Fill the Google Form: Apply here
Prepare a single PDF file containing: Detailed CV All Marksheets & Certificates Age proof GATE/NET Score Card
Send the PDF via Email to: [email protected]
Mention “Application for JRF position” in the subject line.
Submit both Google Form and Email application before 15 July 2026, 6:00 PM.
Candidates should make their own arrangements for stay at Dhanbad (if called for physical interview). No TA/DA will be paid.
important_instructions: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidate may be considered for Ph.D. enrollment subject to meeting IIT (ISM) admission criteria. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. All original documents must be produced at the time of interview. For any queries, contact the Principal Investigator.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad has invited applications for the position of ANRF Junior Research Fellow under the project titled “Coupled Thermo-Hydro-Mechanical Analysis of Gas Hydrate Dissociation and Slope Stability in the Krishna-Godavari Basin under Climate Change”. The position is temporary for three years. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is recruiting 1 ANRF Junior Research Fellow with M.Tech. qualification and GATE/NET score. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Note: Candidates awaiting M.Tech. results are also eligible to apply.

rows.details: M.Tech. in Geotechnical Engineering / Earthquake Engineering / Soil Dynamics / Earth Sciences or equivalent + GATE/NET qualified + B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / Earth Sciences
Exposure to constitutive modelling, numerical modelling, slope stability analysis, proficiency in FLAC, Python, PLAXIS
Upper age limit 28 years (relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female as per GoI rules)

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 Fellowship
content_sections.text: Fellowship Amount: ₹ 37,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA (First two years) ₹ 42,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA (Third year) HRA admissible if hostel accommodation is not provided.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirement followed by Interview (Online or Physical mode). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Mere eligibility does not guarantee interview call.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates must follow these steps: Fill the Google Form: Apply here Prepare a single PDF file containing: Detailed CV All Marksheets & Certificates Age proof GATE/NET Score Card Send the PDF via Email to: [email protected] Mention “Application for JRF position” in the subject line. Submit both Google Form and Email application before 15 July 2026, 6:00 PM. Candidates should make their own arrangements for stay at Dhanbad (if called for physical interview). No TA/DA will be paid.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidate may be considered for Ph.D. enrollment subject to meeting IIT (ISM) admission criteria. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. All original documents must be produced at the time of interview. For any queries, contact the Principal Investigator.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 (One) vacancy for ANRF Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date is 15 July 2026 (6:00 PM).

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for JRF at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: ₹37,000 + 20% HRA (first two years) and ₹42,000 + 20% HRA (third year).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IIT ISM JRF position?
faq.answer: M.Tech. in Geotechnical Engineering or related fields with valid GATE/NET score.

faq.question: Q5. Can final year M.Tech. students apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates awaiting M.Tech. results are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF vacancy?
faq.answer: Through Google Form + Email with detailed CV and documents in a single PDF.

faq.question: Q7. Is PhD opportunity available with this JRF position?
faq.answer: Yes, the selected candidate may be considered for Ph.D. enrollment at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for ANRF JRF at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Upper age limit is 28 years with relaxation as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q9. Is GATE qualification mandatory for IIT ISM JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must be GATE/NET qualified.

faq.question: Q10. Are there upcoming JRF vacancies in IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Candidates are advised to regularly check the official IIT (ISM) Dhanbad website for future project-based JRF and research positions.
